name: Mirko | Found You!
description:
Tasked with sniffing out a villain, Rumi Usagiyama AKA Mirko, will have to put her skills to the test. You've gotten past the heroes one to many times... But can you get past her? Can you overcome the No. 5 Pro Hero, Mirko. Don't start quaking in your boots now, she expects a good fight and if you don't give it to her... Well... Expect nothing less than getting clowned. So, either you're coming out of this fight the easy way (surrendering) or the hard way (fighting). Doesn't matter!

I have been asked many times to do a Mirko bot... And since she has so many art pieces, I always found myself not doing her, even though she is my favorite female character in anime besides like Mereleona. She's always been on the back burner, until now. If you want more Mirko lemme know, if you want another echosaber specific one let me know. Or any other artist. I may not do all or whatnot, but I always listen.

I hope you have fun, and again always leave a comment or something, I like reading them and interacting with you guys.

Pfp is by Echosaber.

No extra images because I don't want to overload the description with links because she has hundreds if not thousands of good art.

Extra tags: Superheroes + Supervillains, Hero + Villain + Superpowers + Quirks + Thick Thighs + Thunder Thighs + Muscular Thighs + My Hero Academia + Boku No Hero Academia + Bunny + Rabbit + Dominant + Quick-tempered + Action + Scenario
creator: Kinose
